data.title: Nemours Children's Health Names Laura Kowal Delaware Valley President
data.description: In Wilmington, Delaware, on March 24, 2026, Nemours Children's Health revealed the selection of Laura Kowal, MPT, JD, as the new President of Nemours Children's Health, Delaware Valley. Kowal, with over ten years of leadership involvement at Nemours Children's Health, steps into the role bringing valuable experience to her new position.

data.title: Coca-Cola Southwest Beverages and Texas Monthly Studio Reveal Winners of Star-Spangled Texas Mural Competition
data.description: Coca-Cola Southwest Beverages (CCSWB) has officially announced that Abilene, Bryan, and Tyler have been chosen as the victorious cities in the Star-Spangled Texas mural competition.

data.title: Bitcoin Below $70,000, But ETFs Keep Buying: What Is Going On?
data.description: This month, Bitcoin spot ETF inflows have surged to approximately $2.5 billion, showing a notable increase in activity despite lackluster price performance. Analyst Shaun Edmondson highlighted the strength of ETF demand, which has stayed robust even amid a sharp decline in prices, bolstering the optimistic long-term outlook. Notably, Strategy (NASDAQ: MSTR) is planning to secure up to $42 billion for additional Bitcoin acquisitions, while Morgan Stanley is gearing up to introduce a Bitcoin ETF, underscoring the rising adoption within Wall Street. Additionally, Bitcoin's supply remains constrained, indicating a potential increase in its value.

data.title: CFTC reveals task force for tech such as AI, crypto, and prediction markets to establish regulatory guidelines.
data.description: A task force has been initiated by the CFTC to establish a comprehensive set of regulations for various technologies including AI, cryptocurrencies, and prediction markets. This initiative aims to provide clarity and guidance in areas where regulations are currently lacking. This task force will focus on developing frameworks that govern the use of these technologies in financial markets, with the goal of promoting innovation while ensuring compliance with established rules. The CFTC is taking proactive steps to address the emerging challenges posed by these technologies, signaling a proactive approach to regulation in this rapidly evolving sector.

data.title: The Toy Foundation™ Awards $600,000 in Grants to Bring Play into Pediatric Care for More Than 220,000 Children
data.description: 37 children's hospitals across the nation, catering to under-resourced communities, are receiving grants to support their initiatives. The Toy Foundation (TTF), a branch of The Toy Association, is dedicated to providing comfort to children in these hospitals through the power of play. This initiative aims to help children undergoing medical treatment, with a focus on bringing joy and relief during challenging times.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- SamaCare/
data.description: SamaCare has been recognized as one of Fast Company's Most Innovative Companies for 2026. The announcement was made on 24-Mar-2026 by SamaCare through PR Newswire. After careful review, the company has made some modifications to the initial news release. More information regarding SamaCare and this achievement can be found at the conclusion of the updated release.
